name: Fitsman
desc: Grab PC games straight from FitGirl Repacks — search, browse, and download right inside Telegram.

name: Nextup File Bot
desc: Store and share files of any size with a private cloud-style link. Handy for backups and quick transfers.

name: BotFather
desc: The official Telegram bot for creating and managing your own bots. Set commands, descriptions, and API tokens — all from chat.

name: AvaBot
desc: An AI-powered personal assistant that answers your questions, helps with tasks, and keeps things conversational.

name: TikTok Downloader
desc: Download TikTok videos cleanly — no watermark, no hassle. Just paste the link and get the file.

name: Ysaver Bot
desc: Download YouTube videos and audio for free. Supports time-coded segments — just add start and end timestamps to the link.

desc: Search and stream music directly inside Telegram. A clean, no-fuss bot for when you just want to hit play.
